creator: rtdean@cytherianage.net
text:
I still haven't had a chance to review this - I've been having issues
getting openjdk to load on my system, and I haven't had enough time to
build a new system just to test this package.

I am not actively using this port any longer, and am willing to release
maintainership, since it appears that the submitter is willing to pick
up maintainership per their second patch.
